<section_header_level_1><loc_49><loc_45><loc_269><loc_58>General Purpose Transistor</section_header_level_1>
<section_header_level_1><loc_49><loc_65><loc_114><loc_75>NPN Silicon</section_header_level_1>
<section_header_level_1><loc_49><loc_83><loc_267><loc_95>MMBT3904L, SMMBT3904L</section_header_level_1>
<section_header_level_1><loc_49><loc_105><loc_79><loc_111>Features</section_header_level_1>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_49><loc_112><loc_277><loc_127>· These Devices are Pb-Free, Halogen Free/BFR Free and are RoHS Compliant</list_item>
<list_item><loc_49><loc_128><loc_275><loc_151>· S Prefix for Automotive and Other Applications Requiring Unique Site and Control Change Requirements; AEC-Q101 Qualified and PPAP Capable</list_item>
</unordered_list>
<section_header_level_1><loc_51><loc_160><loc_123><loc_167>MAXIMUM RATINGS</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_49><loc_168><loc_277><loc_226><fcel>Rating<fcel>Symbol<fcel>Value<fcel>Unit<nl><fcel>Collector - Emitter Voltage<fcel>V$_{CEO}$<fcel>40<fcel>Vdc<nl><fcel>Collector - Base Voltage<fcel>V$_{CBO}$<fcel>60<fcel>Vdc<nl><fcel>Emitter - Base Voltage<fcel>V$_{EBO}$<fcel>6.0<fcel>Vdc<nl><fcel>Collector Current - Continuous<fcel>I$_{C}$<fcel>200<fcel>mAdc<nl><fcel>Collector Current - Peak (Note 3)<fcel>I$_{CM}$<fcel>900<fcel>mAdc<nl></otsl>
<section_header_level_1><loc_53><loc_229><loc_160><loc_235>THERMAL CHARACTERISTICS</section_header_level_1>
<otsl><loc_48><loc_236><loc_276><loc_323><fcel>Characteristic<fcel>Symbol<fcel>Max<fcel>Unit<nl><fcel>Total Device Dissipation FR-5 Board (Note 1) @T$_{A}$ = 25°C  Derate above 25°C<fcel>PD<fcel>225 1.8<fcel>mW  mW/°C<nl><fcel>Thermal Resistance, Junction-to-Ambient<fcel>R$_{θJA}$<fcel>556<fcel>°C/W<nl><fcel>Total Device Dissipation Alumina  Substrate, (Note 2) @T$_{A}$ = 25°C  Derate above 25°C<fcel>P$_{D}$<fcel>300 2.4<fcel>mW  mW/°C<nl><fcel>Thermal Resistance, Junction-to-Ambient<fcel>R$_{θJA}$<fcel>417<fcel>°C/W<nl><fcel>Junction and Storage Temperature<fcel>T$_{J}$, T$_{stg}$<fcel>-55 to +150<fcel>°C<nl></otsl>
<text><loc_49><loc_324><loc_276><loc_341>Stresses exceeding those listed in the Maximum Ratings table may damage the device. If any of these limits are exceeded, device functionality should not be assumed, damage may occur and reliability may be affected.</text>
<unordered_list><list_item><loc_49><loc_341><loc_180><loc_346>1. FR-5 = 1.0 × 0.75 × 0.062 in.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_49><loc_347><loc_199><loc_352>2. Alumina = 0.4 × 0.3 × 0.024 in. 99.5% alumina.</list_item>
<list_item><loc_49><loc_353><loc_123><loc_358>3. Reference SOA curve.</list_item>
</unordered_list>
